summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RiDATOUR travel company internal portal. Backend APIs are fully functional (100% success rate), frontend has core functionality working but with critical modal overlay issues blocking navigation.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay blocks navigation clicks after form submission
ui_bugs.description: After creating leads/customers/trips, modal overlay remains and prevents clicking navigation links

ui_bugs.issue: Missing aria-describedby attributes causing accessibility warnings
ui_bugs.description: Console warnings about missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent

integration_issues.issue: Modal dialogs not properly closing after successful form submission
integration_issues.description: Forms submit successfully but modal overlay persists, blocking further interaction

passed_tests: Navigation to Leads, Customers, Trips pages
CRUD form functionality for Leads, Customers, Trips
All backend CRUD operations (20/20 tests passed)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical modal overlay issue preventing navigation after form submissions. Modal dialogs need proper cleanup after successful form submission to prevent blocking user interactions.
